name: Blue Bird
short_description: Blue Bird is a Visual Novel following the lives of four youths. The protagonist, Karin, lost someone very dear to him in his childhood… Yet thanks to fate, he meets a young girl who will change his empty life and give it meaning. Be a part of this love story and help lead Karin to a bright future!
detailed_description:
Blue Bird is a Visual Novel following the lives of four youths.
The protagonist, Karin, lost someone very dear to him in his childhood…
Yet thanks to fate, he meets a young girl who will change his empty life and give it meaning.

Be a part of this love story and help lead Karin to a bright future!

์Note before buy

- This game is still in development.
- After you purchased a bluebird. You'll gain access to a full game (5 Episodes) and doesn't require to buy any "Season Pass".
Just buy and wait another episode come out and play it!!



And Steam Trading Cards will Coming Soon!!!
